dataset.name: Geoscape G-NAF address points (WA subset)
dataset.product: G-NAF full release (GDA2020 PSV) — G-NAF Core is not published on data.gov.au, so the full product was used

load.method: psql \copy of WA_ADDRESS_DETAIL / WA_ADDRESS_DEFAULT_GEOCODE / WA_STREET_LOCALITY / WA_LOCALITY PSV into gnaf_stage.*, then set-based INSERT ... ON CONFLICT (gnaf_pid) DO UPDATE into address_points; staging schema dropped after load
load.filters: WA state files only; date_retired empty; default geocode with non-null lon/lat
load.truncation: none — all 1,673,144 active WA address rows loaded

validation.cockburn_check: ST_Within against lg_areas row 'COCKBURN, CITY OF' (139 lg_areas loaded by parallel agent)
